name: test-automation-in-practice-2025

scripts.allure:clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['allure-results', 'allure-report'].forEach((path) => fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }));"
scripts.test:report: npm run allure:clean && npm run test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:api:report: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:api && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:ui:report: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:ui && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open

description: A modern TypeScript-based test suite for validating both API and UI layers of a Dockerized AWS-like application stack
